classicQuote.text: 世事洞明皆学问，人情练达即文章。
classicQuote.author: 曹雪芹
classicQuote.note: 技术之外，理解人和场景，往往更能拉开差距。

featuredPlace.title: 卡帕多奇亚
featuredPlace.summary: 热气球、岩柱和柔和晨光一起出现的时候，会有一种很梦境的秩序感。

featuredPlaces.title: 卡帕多奇亚
featuredPlaces.summary: 热气球、岩柱和柔和晨光一起出现的时候，会有一种很梦境的秩序感。

featuredPlaces.title: 马丘比丘
featuredPlaces.summary: 云雾、山脊和古城石墙叠在一起，自带一种很强的历史纵深。

featuredPlaces.title: 哈尔施塔特
featuredPlaces.summary: 湖光山色与尖顶小镇交错在一起，像一张被晨雾轻轻擦亮的明信片。

featuredPlaces.title: 圣托里尼
featuredPlaces.summary: 蓝白山城贴着火山海岸线展开，黄昏时分的光线尤其适合短暂逃离现实。

featuredPlaces.title: 岚山竹林
featuredPlaces.summary: 风穿过竹林时像是一种很轻的回声，适合放在忙碌工作日的一角，让页面有一点呼吸感。

featuredPlaces.title: 梦莲湖
featuredPlaces.summary: 冰川湖水像调过色的蓝宝石，雪山和松林把整个画面压得既安静又辽阔。

international.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
international.summary: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.

international.title: US intercepts and seizes Iranian-flagged cargo ship, Trump says
international.summary: Tehran vows retaliation soon for what it calls an "act of armed piracy", which comes as the US prepares for a second round of talks.

international.title: 2 US Embassy trainers and 2 Mexican agents die in Chihuahua highway crash after drug operation
Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, police say
international.summary: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting that police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".

international.title: Tehran will never cede control of Strait of Hormuz, senior Iranian politician tells BBC
international.summary: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.

nba.title: Magic stun top-seeded Pistons with Game 1 upset
nba.summary: The Magic extended the NBA's longest home playoff losing streak after upsetting the No. 1 seed Detroit Pistons in Game 1 of their first-round series.

nba.title: Wembanyama joins SGA, Jokic as MVP finalist
nba.summary: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Nikola Jokic and Victor Wembanyama were named finalists for this season's Most Valuable Player award.

nba.title: Thunder take Game 1, expect Suns 'to get better'
nba.summary: The Oklahoma City Thunder, the NBA's defending champions and the No. 1 seed in the Western Conference, opened their latest postseason run Sunday after...

nba.title: Sixers face familiar fate as C's, Tatum dominate
nba.summary: The Celtics are off to a good start in their hopes to hand Philadelphia its seventh straight series loss between the rivals.

nba.title: LeBron plays 'triple threat' to spring Game 1 upset
nba.summary: With Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves sidelined, LeBron James ignited the Lakers' offense with "a little bit of everything," posting 19 points, 13 assist...

nba.title: Barkley: Jordan rift easing, golf game planned
nba.summary: Charles Barkley says he and Michael Jordan are talking again after nearly 15 years and that the two plan to play golf together in the offseason.

sections.title: 数据存储相关
sections.description: 数据库、分布式存储、向量检索与数据系统方向的经典与高影响力论文。

items.title: The FAISS Library
items.summary: 向量检索领域最常用的基础库之一，理解它有助于把握向量数据库背后的核心算法。

items.title: DiskANN: Fast Accurate Billion-point Nearest Neighbor Search on a Single Node
items.summary: 大规模向量检索的代表性工作，兼顾磁盘索引、精度和吞吐，工程价值非常高。

items.title: The Log-Structured Merge-Tree (LSM-Tree)
items.summary: 现代写优化存储引擎的源头之一，后来的 LevelDB、RocksDB 等系统都深受它影响。

sections.title: 计算机视觉相关
sections.description: 视觉基础模型、识别、检测、分割和多模态视觉方向的代表论文。

items.title: DINOv2: Learning Robust Visual Features without Supervision
items.summary: 近年非常强的视觉表示学习工作，实际应用和迁移能力都很突出。

items.title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
items.summary: ResNet 是现代视觉 backbone 的里程碑，理解它基本等于理解深层网络训练的拐点。

items.title: End-to-End Object Detection with Transformers
items.summary: DETR 把 Transformer 正式带入目标检测，后来一系列视觉 transformer 检测器都和它有关。

sections.title: 大模型记忆库相关
sections.description: RAG、长期记忆、外部记忆和知识增强方向的高质量论文。

items.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
items.summary: RAG 的奠基论文，今天绝大多数知识增强问答、企业知识库方案都能追溯到这篇。

items.title: Memorizing Transformers
items.summary: 将外部记忆机制引入 Transformer，是长期记忆和可扩展上下文方向的重要代表作。

items.title: RETRO: Improving Language Models by Retrieving From Trillions of Tokens
items.summary: 把检索做成语言模型的一等公民，是大规模检索增强建模的重要路线。

sections.title: Agent 相关
sections.description: 自主智能体、工具调用、多 Agent 协同与软件 Agent 的代表论文。

items.title: Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools
items.summary: 工具调用主线论文之一，今天很多 function calling 和 agent tool use 都能和它对上脉络。

items.title: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior
items.summary: Agent 社会模拟的代表作，对长期记忆、规划和多主体交互都有直接启发。

items.title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
items.summary: 把自动课程学习、技能库和持续探索结合起来，是 embodied agent 的代表工作。
